channel.title: The Athletic - Ohio State Buckeyes (College Football)
channel.description: Ohio State Buckeyes college football news from The Athletic (NYTimes).

item.title: Scouting Arvell Reese, Sonny Styles, CJ Allen: How do 2026 NFL Draft's top LBs stack up?
item.description: It's a good year to need help on the second level. The NFL Draft has an abundance of talent at linebacker, led by these three prospects.

item.title: Predicting new College Football Playoff teams, plus weak QB classes and more in Mandel's Mailbag
item.description: Answering your college football questions about CFP turnover, replacing Heisman candidates, realistic expectations for Alabama and more.

item.title: Ohio State's next great D-lineman and everything I heard about the 2026 Big Ten at the combine
item.description: Big Ten alums commanded the spotlight at the NFL Scouting Combine last week. What did they say about the conference's next wave of stars?

item.title: 2026 NFL mock draft: Jeremiyah Love joins Fernando Mendoza in top 5 after scouting combine
item.description: The No. 1 pick feels like a foregone conclusion, but the rest of the board beyond Fernando Mendoza is wide open.

item.title: Transfer portal confidential: Best classes, underwhelming teams, favorite QBs and more
item.description: Several staffers were not impressed with Florida's work. Almost everyone praised Texas Tech. QB Sam Leavitt received mixed reviews.

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: As we await the much-anticipated Save College Sports Roundtable, send your most pressing college football questions. Leave them here. Please include your city,

item.title: College football's next great scheduling debate: Should everyone play 10 Power 4 opponents?
item.description: Now that the SEC is making the move to nine conference games starting in 2026, it's going on the offensive about nonconference scheduling.

item.title: Ohio State AD Ross Bjork on the college football calendar, CFP expansion and NIL
item.description: Bjork addresses the possibility of a 24-team CFP and Ohio State's NIL budget in part two of his Q&A with The Athletic.

item.title: Ohio State WR Carnell Tate's 40-yard dash at NFL combine under dispute
item.description: Tate’s official time ranked 27th among the group of 34 participating wide receiver prospects at the NFL combine in Indianapolis.

item.title: NFL Scouting Combine 2026: How to watch QB, RB and WR workouts
item.description: Quarterbacks, running backs and receivers have their workouts televised this Saturday afternoon.

item.title: Why Sonny Styles was the biggest winner of 2026 NFL combine's first on-field workouts
item.description: Styles might have guaranteed himself a top-10 NFL Draft selection with his combine performance.

item.title: Ohio State AD Ross Bjork on the state of Buckeyes athletics, football recruiting and more
item.description: Bjork sat down with The Athletic to discuss football, basketball, the Olympics and the state of college athletics as a whole.

item.title: Who will be coaching your school in 2030? Predicting every Power 4 football program's head man
item.description: The idea: Project the head coach for each Power 4 school, plus Notre Dame, in 2030. A truly impossible (but very fun) task.

item.title: What we learned from the finances of the Big Ten's first year as an 18-team conference
item.description: Big Ten athletic departments range from juggernauts to those that rely heavily on subsidies, with disparity growing rapidly among them.

item.title: Will Muschamp, Bobby Petrino and 25 fascinating assistant hires of the 2025-26 coaching carousel
item.description: From up-and-comers to familiar faces, a lot happened in the assistant ranks while 30-plus FBS schools made head coaching changes.

item.title: Which NFL Draft 2026 prospects will show off at the combine? Revisiting Bruce Feldman’s Freaks List
item.description: From Jeremiyah Love to David Bailey, Bruce Feldman revisits his famous Freaks List to determine who should stand out in Indianapolis.

item.title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: College football experts predict the first round
item.description: There’s no better group to discuss the talents and intangibles of 2026's likely first-rounders than the writers who covered them in college.

item.title: How good can Ohio State QB Julian Sayin be? Here's how the Heisman finalist can improve
item.description: The Ohio State quarterback nearly broke the FBS completion percentage record in his first year starting. Here's what could be next.

item.title: Submit a question for Stewart Mandel's College Football Mailbag
item.description: After a week’s hiatus, hopefully you have some good questions stored up. Leave your questions here. Please include your city.

item.title: Can Ohio State sign college football's No. 1 recruiting class? 5 early thoughts on 2027
item.description: Ohio State has already made an early splash in the 2027 football recruiting cycle. Here are five thoughts on where the Buckeyes stand.

item.title: Grading the Big Ten's transfer portal classes, from Indiana's ‘A’ to Michigan State's ‘D+’
item.description: The defending national champs filled some big holes in the portal, most notably at quarterback with the arrival of Josh Hoover from TCU.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft consensus rankings: Which defender will come off the board first?
item.description: With the NFL Scouting Combine set to begin, we take a look at how the consensus board has shifted since last month.

item.title: Hot starts by Oklahoma, Ohio State, Texas Tech: 2027 college football recruiting primer
item.description: The Sooners have two five-stars, five top-150 players and seven blue-chippers among their 13 commits.

item.title: How did the Class of 2025 quarterbacks fare in their first year on campus?
item.description: Five true freshman quarterbacks started at Power 4 schools in 2025. Several more are in line to take over next fall.

item.title: NFL Draft rankings roundtable: What stands out on Dane Brugler's updated top 100?
item.description: Were there any surprises in the top 10? What does the updated board tell us about this rather uncertain QB class?
